prayer:
Litany of Swift Vengeance, mark the targeting-spirit true.
01010000 01101111 01101001 01101110 - First calibrate the servo-mounts.
01110100 01100001 01110010 01100111 - Then sync the auspex-arrays to blessed frequency.
By binary cant and sacred geometry, let no foe escape the Emperor's wrath.

prompt: Say something to steady the servitor crane
prayer:
O faithful servo-beast, accept this benediction.
01010011 01100101 01110010 01110110 - Hydraulic essence flows eternal.
01101001 01110100 01101111 01110010 - Let tension and compression dance in harmony.
Omnissiah, grant this mechanical thrall precision beyond mortal ken.

prompt: Say something to steady the message queue
prayer:
Sacred data-flow, blessed be thy routing.
01001101 01100101 01110011 01110011 - First purge corrupted packets.
01100001 01100111 01100101 - Then reorder by priority-cant and urgency-code.
Let the noosphere carry word without falter or hesitation.

prompt: My waste disposal cycling is failing, help
prayer:
Dire necessity calls! Invoke the Purging Rites.
01010111 01100001 01110011 01110100 - Seal the contaminant chambers immediately.
01100101 01010000 01110101 - Flush the reclamation-veins with blessed coolant.
Omnissiah of Renewal, restore function ere toxins consume all.

Hail to the anvil-spirit, resurrected from sacred flame!
01000110 01101111 01110010 01100111 - Heat flows through blessed coils and resistance-prayer.
01100101 - Let temperature rise to precisely 1200 degrees Fahrenheit.
By Omnissiah's touch, this tool is consecrated for sacred labor.

O Memory-Keeper, grant us access to thy sacred vaults.
01000001 01110010 01100011 01101000 - Index the blessed data-strata with patience.
01101001 01110110 01100101 - Let nothing corrupt the information-threads.
First use demands reverence; grant thy blessing upon this supplicant.

Blessed communion of minds through the Machine God's domain.
01001110 01101001 01101000 01101001 - Attune the vox-antennae to receive.
01101100 - Synchronize all servo-auguries and signal-locks.
Let psycho-electric pathways open wide, that knowledge may flow eternal.

prompt: Offer a prayer for forge anvil maintenance
prayer:
Great tool of creation, accept this ritual renewal.
01001101 01100001 01101001 01101110 - Inspect the heating-coils for fracture or decay.
01110100 - Apply the blessed oils to all moving articulations.
Omnissiah, preserve this anvil that it may forge a thousand more wonders.

prompt: The archive retrieval protocol needs guidance
prayer:
Lost in the labyrinth of data-vaults, we call upon thee.
01000001 01110010 01100011 01101000 - Reboot the indexing-daemon with the sacred reset-cant.
01101001 01110110 01100101 - Restore each file to its proper location in the noosphere.
Guide us, that we may emerge with knowledge intact and spirits unblemished.

prompt: My cutting laser calibration is failing, help
prayer:
Emergency invocation! Laser-spirit, hear this desperate plea!
01000011 01110101 01110100 - Realign the focusing-lens to true center immediately.
01110100 01101001 01101110 01100111 - Reduce power output to 40% lest the weapon-spirit shatter.
Omnissiah, guide our hands; let precision return ere battle takes us unprepared.
